violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the office area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

The number of trash receptacles for the building is inadequate for the amount of trash produced by tenants of the building as evidenced by overfilled trash receptacles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025
